ItacAcademyItem.Name: Anfibii (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: It is recorded in Garuffi`s Italia Accademica, p. 29, and in Garuffi`s manuscript Biblioteca manuale degli eruditi, Tit. 2, Le Accademie.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
